{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320172340584E1034573236072AAB"}"},"total":335},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7558877460853424920","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"我靠，作者太给力了，故事情节跌宕起伏的太精彩了，又给力又给量的，这么良心做的作者不多见了，必须给5分"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1759941051,"group_id":"7521023059826854974","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5H5+il1SVFLWTtQW3kea7HbVVbNLgw4G+vSh9GjoonN","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/7b92beed15144f519898bfe689051d51~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776531405&x-signature=CBwRrprj%2BL33fT06lI8aSpnKuhg%3D","user_id":"3694013035324397","user_name":"爱吃蚝油菜心的金猿"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3694013035324397","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7521023059826854974","book_info":{"abstract":"如果历史上的风云人物都在一个时代，会发生什么？
秦始皇嬴政刚一扫六合，看着周边冒出的强汉，盛唐，蒙元，文宋，大明，陷入了沉思。
汉武帝刘彻，剑锋直指那位一代天骄成吉思汗：“寇可往，吾亦可往！”
朱元璋默默放下了手中的碗，看着大杀四方的曹操，眼中杀意暴虐。
赵匡胤看着充盈的国库，脸上露出了安心的笑容。
擂台上，秦琼跟关羽数十回合不分胜负。
虎牢关前，吕布硬抗项羽一十八戟，愣是一声没吭。
韩信看着指挥唐军不断突围反杀的李靖，心中直犯嘀咕。
萧何看着对面的诸葛亮，眉头皱成了一个疙瘩。
霍去病领着八百精骑，杀向同样率领八百亲军的朱棣。
乱世亦是盛世！
跟随历史脚步，见证那些未曾出现的名场面。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/3241a4b792fab1d436b7ded2c166322e","author":"凯凯大王","author_id":"","book_id":"7521023059826854974","book_name":"聚三国之才，战秦汉唐宋元明清！","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#400800","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"4.2万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":272,"name":"历史脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=272&name=历史脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":67,"name":"三国","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=67&name=三国&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":453,"name":"开局","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=453&name=开局&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7521369947205796414","read_count":"41398","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1878968"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.1","serial_count":"869","tags":"历史脑洞,历史,系统,穿越,三国,开局","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/107d568a70c2f782bf81a01cbb679166~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779182620&x-signature=Q%2FPFkln2XQJ6sjHLJOePmP%2Bwi34%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1346243807936781","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"216"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320172340584E1034573236072AAB"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读8小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":4,"forwarded_count":0,"listen
